text.title: AC-to-Assertion Mapping Procedure
text.summary: Step-by-step procedure to produce the ac-mapping artefact end-to-end. Each step lists input, action, output, and an optional decision gate.

step.name: extract-acs-from-story
step.action: Run `scripts/extract-acs` against the linked story; populate ac-mapping.yaml with one row per AC, leaving `tests` and `asserted_behavior` empty.
step.output: Skeleton ac-mapping.yaml with one row per AC.
step.decision-gate: Halt when the story has zero ACs — fix the story first, this methodology does not apply.

step.name: draft-tests-and-mapping
step.action: For each AC, write or identify the test(s) that verify it; record file_path, test_name, asserted_behavior (state / output / side-effect / negative).
step.decision-gate: Reject when any AC still has empty `tests` at PR open.

step.name: classify-assertion-class
step.input: Each test entry's body + the AC text.
step.action: Classify each assertion as state | output | side_effect | negative. Reject "called", "no exception", "status 200 alone" tokens.
step.output: assertion_class set for every test entry.
step.decision-gate: Reject any entry where the assertion is structural per rule r2.

step.name: reviewer-walks-the-map
step.action: Reviewer reads each AC, opens the referenced test, confirms the assertion matches the AC promise. Rejects any mismatch.
step.output: Reviewer-walked flag set or specific rejection comments.
step.decision-gate: Block merge while any AC remains unverified.

step.name: pre-merge-gate
step.action: Run `scripts/validate-qa-ac-to-assertion-mapping.py` plus the existence check on test names; reject the merge if either fails.
step.decision-gate: Block merge on any validator violation.
